Bash(/usr/local/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

img = Image.open\("/Users/mybubu/Desktop/Karmanya Kreatives Website/public/Logo_upscayl.png"\).convert\("RGB"\)
arr = np.array\(img\)

# Find non-black pixels \(logo content\)
mask = \(arr[:,:,0] > 20\) | \(arr[:,:,1] > 20\) | \(arr[:,:,2] > 20\)
rows = np.any\(mask, axis=1\)
cols = np.any\(mask, axis=0\)
rmin, rmax = np.where\(rows\)[0][[0, -1]]
cmin, cmax = np.where\(cols\)[0][[0, -1]]

print\(f"Logo bounds: top={rmin}, bottom={rmax}, left={cmin}, right={cmax}"\)
print\(f"Image size: {img.size}"\)

# Add padding
pad = 30
rmin = max\(0, rmin - pad\)
rmax = min\(img.size[1], rmax + pad\)
cmin = max\(0, cmin - pad\)
cmax = min\(img.size[0], cmax + pad\)

cropped = img.crop\(\(cmin, rmin, cmax, rmax\)\)
cropped.save\("/Users/mybubu/Desktop/Karmanya Kreatives Website/public/Logo_upscayl.png"\)
print\(f"Cropped size: {cropped.size}"\)
EOF)

Bash(/usr/local/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image

img = Image.open\("/Users/mybubu/Desktop/Karmanya Kreatives Website/public/Logo_upscayl.png"\).convert\("RGB"\)

# Get bounding box of non-black content
bg = Image.new\("RGB", img.size, \(0, 0, 0\)\)
diff = img.point\(lambda p: 255 if p > 20 else 0\)
bbox = diff.getbbox\(\)
print\(f"Bounding box: {bbox}"\)
print\(f"Original size: {img.size}"\)

# Add padding and crop
pad = 40
left = max\(0, bbox[0] - pad\)
top = max\(0, bbox[1] - pad\)
right = min\(img.size[0], bbox[2] + pad\)
bottom = min\(img.size[1], bbox[3] + pad\)

cropped = img.crop\(\(left, top, right, bottom\)\)
cropped.save\("/Users/mybubu/Desktop/Karmanya Kreatives Website/public/Logo_upscayl.png"\)
print\(f"Cropped size: {cropped.size}"\)
print\("Done!"\)
EOF)

Bash(/usr/local/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image

img = Image.open\("/Users/mybubu/Desktop/Karmanya Kreatives Website/public/Logo_upscayl.png"\).convert\("RGB"\)
w, h = img.size
print\(f"Current size: {w}x{h}"\)

# Make it perfectly square by adding equal padding on all sides
size = max\(w, h\)
square = Image.new\("RGB", \(size, size\), \(0, 0, 0\)\)
offset_x = \(size - w\) // 2
offset_y = \(size - h\) // 2
square.paste\(img, \(offset_x, offset_y\)\)
square.save\("/Users/mybubu/Desktop/Karmanya Kreatives Website/public/Logo_upscayl.png"\)
print\(f"New size: {square.size} \(perfectly square\)"\)
EOF)
